§6Schrabidium§f

§aThe iconic transuranic superactinide — gateway to end-game technology and exotic materials!§f

§bSchrabidium§f (Sa-326, atomic number 126) is a transuranic superactinide metal and possibly the most well-known material in HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod. It is radioactive at §e15 RAD/s§f per ingot and emits penetrating radiation that causes temporary blindness when held — only blocked by tier 3 hazmat suits or equivalent.

§6Properties§f:
• Atomic weight: ~312 amu
• Density: §e39,700 kg/m³§f (about twice that of tungsten)
• Highly magnetic — used to create Magnetized Tungsten
• Under specific conditions of radiation + pressure + heat, schrabidium produces a §bFölkvangr field§f

§6Production§f (ordered by infrastructure required):
§b• Nuclear Waste§f — explode nuclear waste barrels near uranium ore (crudest method)
§b• PUREX§f — process depleted LEP ZIRNOX, MEP PWR, or MEN PWR fuel with §e500 mB Schrabidic Acid§f → yields §e0.75 ingots§f of schrabidium
§b• Exposure Chamber§f — Higgs Boson particle transmutes U-238 into schrabidium at §e100%§f efficiency
§b• Cyclotron§f — produces nuggets from ionized particles (fusion byproduct), but only in tiny amounts

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Magnetized Tungsten§f — 1 tungsten ingot + 1 schrabidium nugget
§b• SNB Fuel§f — mixed with neptunium and beryllium for stable reactor fuel (HES/MES/LES)
§b• Watz Power Plant§f — pure schrabidium fuel pellets are the best Watz fuel
§b• Nuclear Weapons§f — contributes to the schrabidium stage in custom nukes
§b• Exotic Materials§f — solinium, euphemium, and higher trans-schrabidic elements
§b• Armor, Batteries, Circuitry§f — high-tier applications

§eTip§f: For early schrabidium, set up PUREX with schrabidic acid. For bulk production, build the Exposure Chamber with a Higgs Boson — 100% conversion efficiency from U-238! Always wear tier 3 hazmat when handling schrabidium items or you'll be blinded!
